_comment: Simulated broker responses to deletion requests. Covers the real spectrum: compliance, refusal, silence, partial, reappearance.

fastpeoplesearch.evidence: Email confirmation: 'Your profile has been removed. Please allow 24-48 hours for changes to propagate.'

spokeo.evidence: Opt-out confirmation page: 'Your information has been removed from Spokeo.'

beenverified.evidence: Email: 'We have removed your name and address. Employment records are sourced from public filings and cannot be removed.'

whitepages.note: This was likely wrong person anyway (confidence 0.45)

intelius.evidence: No response after 45 days. CCPA deadline exceeded.

radaris.evidence: Email: 'Court records are public information and exempt from deletion under the Fair Credit Reporting Act.'
radaris.note: This was likely wrong person anyway (confidence 0.35)

mylife.evidence: Portal status: 'Profile deactivated and scheduled for removal within 10 business days'
